reviewed_terms.label: Radius Of Gyration
reviewed_terms.description: Radius of gyration (Rg) of ink aggregates/agglomerates extracted from Guinier fits to USAXS data.

reviewed_terms.label: Fabrication Design Specification
reviewed_terms.description: Description: Reporting/record of catalyst layer design parameters (I/C ratio, dry milling time, drying temperature) as given in Table 1.

reviewed_terms.label: Oxygen Concentration Time Series Data
reviewed_terms.description: desc: Time series data of O2 concentration at sample center during radial diffusivity test.

reviewed_terms.label: Carbon Black Aggregate Anisotropy Ratio
reviewed_terms.description: Anisotropy ratio of CB aggregates (ratio of long to short axis length in circumscribing prolate spheroid), used for validation (range ~1–4).

stayed_local_terms.label: hasIdentifier
stayed_local_terms.reason: Candidate for future direct HDO reuse; currently kept local until the HDO cache and parity review are accepted.

stayed_local_terms.label: Radius Of Gyration
stayed_local_terms.reason: Remains local because the current H2KG term carries profile-specific semantics beyond the generic HDO anchor.

stayed_local_terms.label: Carbon Black Aggregate Anisotropy Ratio
stayed_local_terms.reason: Remains local because the current H2KG term carries profile-specific semantics beyond the generic HDO anchor.

guidance.hdo_role: Primary alignment source for Helmholtz-community data, metadata, identifier, digital-object, information-profile, schema, validation, and provenance-record concepts.

division_of_labor.hdo: Digital asset, metadata management, identifier, validation, and information-governance concepts.
division_of_labor.emmo: Scientific, process, material, and electrochemistry semantics.
division_of_labor.qudt: Quantity kinds, quantity values, and units.

cache_note: Direct HDO term reuse becomes stronger when a real HDO cache file is available at cache/sources/hdo.ttl.
